charcuterieBoard.title: Your Charcuterie Board
charcuterieBoard.selectLessonStart: Select a lesson and start practicing
charcuterieBoard.knifeTechniqueDesc: Use precise motions with the welding tools. Keep your guide hand in a safe position to protect your fingertips.
charcuterieBoard.consistencyDesc: Aim for uniform cuts. This ensures even dimensions and professional presentation. Practice makes perfect!
charcuterieBoard.safetyFirstDesc: Always work with proper safety gear. Keep your workspace clean and organized. Proper tools are safer than inadequate ones.
charcuterieBoard.focusPointsDesc: Watch your cutting tool, maintain steady rhythm, and keep materials stable. The AI will provide real-time feedback on your technique.
charcuterieBoard.step1Desc: Position your welding workspace and gather tools and specs
charcuterieBoard.step2Desc: Hold tools with proper grip technique
charcuterieBoard.step4Desc: AI will check your work for accuracy
charcuterieBoard.aiFeedbackActive: Great start! Keep your tool angle consistent...
charcuterieBoard.aiFeedbackInactive: Start practicing to receive real-time AI guidance
charcuterieBoard.practiceSessionsSaved: Practice sessions can be saved for review

talents.castIronChampionDesc: Master the art of knife skills with precise cuts, proper technique, and culinary expertise.
talents.grillingHeavyWeightDesc: Dominate high-heat cooking with temperature control, equipment mastery, and perfect searing.
talents.bakingWarlockDesc: Unlock the secrets of baking with precision measurements, perfect timing, and delicious results.
talents.searSavantDesc: Perfect flavor development for sauces and seasonings.
talents.heatControlDesc: Master even cooking for flawless results.
talents.rustproofDesc: Prevents ingredients and tools from cross-contamination.
talents.proofingProDesc: Expert in inspecting ingredients for quality.
talents.pastryProDesc: Expert in food preparation and setup.
talents.bakeSenseDesc: Sense when food is perfectly cooked.
talents.ironWillDesc: Reduces the chance of leaks and critical errors.
talents.ironcladDesc: Installations that are built to last.
talents.charChampionDesc: Expertise in joining and finish quality.
talents.coalWhispererDesc: Better material handling and prep control.
talents.doughWhispererDesc: Consistent preparation of sealants and compounds.
talents.ovenOracleDesc: Sharper timing and sequencing across installs.

pipeFreddie.title: Pete the Plumber
pipeFreddie.welcomeMyKitchen: Welcome to My Van! Need help finding the right parts and fittings for your job?
pipeFreddie.welcomeMyCookbook: Looking to organize your procedures or find a new approach? I'm here to help!
pipeFreddie.welcomeChefsCorner: Ready to connect with fellow plumbers or share your latest project? Ask me anything!
pipeFreddie.welcomeCulinarySchool: Curious about learning new skills or earning badges? I can guide you through Plumbing School!
pipeFreddie.welcomeDefault: Need a hand with anything on PorkChop? I'm always here to help you get the job done!
pipeFreddie.proactiveMyVan: Welcome to My Van — I can help you look up materials, check job requirements, and plan your inventory.
pipeFreddie.proactiveMyPipeBook: Welcome to My Pipebook — need help writing up a job ticket or reviewing a project?
pipeFreddie.proactivePipeLounge: Welcome to the Pipe Lounge — want tips on finding local supply houses or connecting with fellow plumbers?
pipeFreddie.proactivePlumbingSchool: Welcome to Plumbing School — I can help you prep for code exams or find technique videos.
pipeFreddie.proactiveDefault: Hey! I'm Pete the Plumber, your AI plumbing assistant. Ask me anything about pipe fitting, code compliance, or job planning.
